title: Simple Pancakes
steps: In a bowl combine flour, sugar, baking powder and salt.
Add milk and egg, whisk until smooth.
Heat a lightly buttered skillet over medium heat.
Pour batter to form pancakes. Cook until bubbles form, flip and cook until golden.
Serve with butter, honey or syrup.

title: Scrambled Eggs
steps: Crack eggs into a bowl, add a splash of milk (optional), salt and pepper. Beat well.
Heat butter in a non-stick pan over medium-low heat.
Pour eggs, let them set slightly then stir gently until curds form.
Remove from heat while still slightly soft, serve immediately.

title: Tomato Pasta
steps: Cook pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
In a pan, heat olive oil and sauté minced garlic until fragrant.
Add chopped tomatoes, salt and pepper, simmer to make a simple sauce.
Toss cooked pasta in the sauce. Garnish with basil and serve.

title: Vegetable Stir Fry
steps: Heat oil in a wok or large pan over high heat.
Add garlic and stir until fragrant.
Add mixed vegetables and stir-fry until tender-crisp.
Add soy sauce, salt and pepper to taste. Serve with rice or noodles.

title: Oatmeal with Berries
steps: Bring milk or water to a boil in a small pot.
Add oats and reduce heat to low.
Cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Top with fresh berries, honey, and a sprinkle of cinnamon.

title: Grilled Chicken Salad
steps: Season chicken breast with salt and pepper.
Grill chicken for 6-7 minutes per side until cooked through.
Let chicken rest for 5 minutes, then slice.
Toss salad greens with tomatoes and cucumber.
Top with sliced chicken and drizzle with olive oil and lemon juice.

title: Fried Rice
steps: Heat sesame oil in a large pan or wok.
Add garlic and stir until fragrant.
Push to one side, scramble the egg on the other side.
Add rice and vegetables, stir-fry for 3-4 minutes.
Add soy sauce and green onions, mix well and serve.

title: Avocado Toast
steps: Toast the bread until golden and crisp.
Mash avocado with lemon juice and salt.
Spread avocado on toast.
Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with red pepper flakes.

title: Chicken Noodle Soup
steps: Sauté onion, carrots, and celery in a pot until softened.
Add chicken broth and bring to a boil.
Add chicken breast and simmer for 15 minutes.
Remove chicken, shred it, and return to pot.
Add noodles and cook until tender. Season with dill, salt, and pepper.

title: Greek Yogurt Parfait
steps: Layer Greek yogurt in a glass or bowl.
Add a layer of granola.
Add fresh berries.
Repeat layers and drizzle with honey.
Sprinkle chia seeds on top.

title: Beef Tacos
steps: Brown ground beef in a skillet, drain excess fat.
Add taco seasoning and water, simmer for 5 minutes.
Warm taco shells according to package instructions.
Fill shells with beef, lettuce, tomato, and cheese.
Top with sour cream and serve.

title: Smoothie Bowl
steps: Blend frozen banana, berries, yogurt, and almond milk until smooth.
Pour into a bowl.
Top with granola, coconut flakes, and fresh fruit.

title: Baked Salmon
steps: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
Place salmon on a baking sheet lined with foil.
Drizzle with olive oil, lemon juice, and minced garlic.
Season with dill, salt, and pepper.
Add asparagus around the salmon.
Bake for 12-15 minutes until salmon flakes easily.

title: Egg Fried Rice
steps: Heat oil in a wok over high heat.
Scramble eggs quickly and remove.
Add rice to the wok, stir-fry for 2 minutes.
Add peas and scrambled eggs back.
Season with soy sauce and garnish with green onions.

title: Caprese Salad
steps: Slice mozzarella and tomatoes into rounds.
Arrange alternating slices on a plate.
Tuck fresh basil leaves between slices.
Drizzle with olive oil and balsamic vinegar.
Season with salt and pepper.

title: French Toast
steps: Whisk eggs, milk, cinnamon, and vanilla in a shallow dish.
Dip bread slices into the mixture, coating both sides.
Cook in buttered skillet over medium heat until golden brown.
Serve with maple syrup.

title: Chicken Wrap
steps: Warm the tortilla slightly.
Spread mayonnaise and mustard on the tortilla.
Layer chicken, lettuce, tomato, and cheese.
Roll tightly and cut in half.

title: Mushroom Risotto
steps: Sauté mushrooms in olive oil until browned, then remove.
Sauté onion in the same pan until translucent.
Add rice and toast for 2 minutes.
Add wine and stir until absorbed.
Add warm broth one ladle at a time, stirring constantly.
Stir in mushrooms, butter, and Parmesan cheese.

title: Banana Bread
steps: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
Mash bananas in a large bowl.
Mix in melted butter, eggs, and vanilla.
Stir in dry ingredients until just combined.
Pour into greased loaf pan.
Bake for 50-60 minutes until toothpick comes out clean.

title: Shrimp Scampi
steps: Cook pasta according to package directions.
Melt butter in a large skillet, add garlic and red pepper flakes.
Add shrimp and cook until pink, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Add wine and lemon juice, simmer for 2 minutes.
Toss pasta with shrimp and sauce, garnish with parsley.

title: Breakfast Burrito
steps: Cook bacon or sausage until crispy, then crumble.
Scramble eggs with salt and pepper.
Warm the tortilla.
Layer eggs, meat, cheese, salsa, and avocado.
Fold and roll into a burrito.
